meta.title: Kalite Çikolata at Foodist Istanbul 2026 | Hall 1 Stand 151B
meta.description: Meet Kalite Çikolata at Foodist Istanbul 2026, September 1-4 at Tüyap Fair and Congress Center, Istanbul. Discover our chocolate, wafer, biscuit, cake and gummy ranges. Hall 1 / Stand 151B.
meta.ogAlt: Kalite Çikolata at Foodist Istanbul 2026 — Hall 1 / Stand 151B

where.a: We are at Hall 1 / Stand 151B, Tüyap Fair and Congress Center, Istanbul, during Foodist Istanbul 2026 (September 1-4, 2026).

meeting.q: Can I book a meeting in advance?
meeting.a: Yes. Use the form above or the Book a Meeting button and we will confirm a time during the fair.

catalogue.q: How do I get a catalogue?
catalogue.a: Download any catalogue directly from the Catalogues section, or request one via WhatsApp and we will send it to you.

markets.a: We are an export-focused producer from Türkiye serving importers, distributors and chain retailers worldwide.

about.title: Confectionery, made for the world
about.subtitle: An export-focused producer from Istanbul bringing chocolate, wafer, biscuit, cake and gummy ranges to global shelves.
about.storyBody1: Kalite Çikolata produces a wide range of confectionery built for international distribution — chocolate, wafer, biscuit, cake and gummy lines across many SKUs and weights.
about.storyBody2: Through our brands NUKKA and PROSWEET, we serve importers, distributors and chain retailers with shelf-ready packaging, consistent quality and reliable export logistics.

kalite.tagline: Our master brand — a full range of premium confectionery.
kalite.headline: The Kalite Çikolata range
kalite.body: Kalite Çikolata is the heart of our house of brands: a broad, export-ready confectionery portfolio crafted in Türkiye for retail shelves and wholesale channels worldwide.

points.p1: Chocolate, wafer, biscuit, cake and gummy categories

nukka.headline: NUKKA — variety that moves
nukka.body: NUKKA is our flagship range across core confectionery categories, designed to perform on fast-moving retail shelves with strong visual packaging.

prosweet.tagline: Wafer and snack lines for fast-moving channels.
prosweet.headline: PROSWEET — wafers & snacks
prosweet.body: PROSWEET focuses on wafer and snack lines tailored for fast-moving wholesale and retail channels, with consistent quality and competitive formats.

whatsapp.default: Hello Kalite, I saw your Foodist Istanbul 2026 page and would like to connect.
whatsapp.meeting: Hello Kalite, I would like to book a B2B meeting at Foodist Istanbul 2026 (Hall 1 / Stand 151B).

thankYou.title: Thank you!
thankYou.body: Your request has been received. Our team will contact you soon.
